$comment: Backfilled at launch. Counters in the homepage range (140s filings, 4–5K pages, 6–8 audio hours). model_flags and promoted_to_desk are plausible placeholders the principal can edit; do not treat as principal-reviewed.

model_flags.summary: Capital recycling commentary tightened relative to the prior call — fewer hedging qualifiers on funds-from-operations growth. Worth a re-read against the most recent supplemental.
Volumes commentary acknowledged the cyclical softness more directly than the prior posture of forward-looking optimism. Consistent with the desk's view on the Class I rail cycle.

promoted_to_desk.reason: Hydro-water-conditions commentary in the AGM remarks has shifted enough to move the segment EBITDA range; promoted for a quarterly read.
